chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4689 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 18.08.2025 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota advocate for the petitioner Ms. Wajiha Mehdi Asstt. Attorney General Mr. Harchand Rai advocate for respondents No.2 and 3 -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The petitioner’s case is that he was awarded the major penalty of removal from service by Zarai Tariqiati Bank Limited. He has challenged this removal on the ground that the enquiry conducted against him was not inconformity with law. After hearing learned counsel for the petitioner at length and going through the relevant documents, learned counsel for the petitioner states that he would be satisfied if this Court sets aside the impugned order dated 04.10.2021 and orders that a de-novo enquiry be conducted against the petitioner, strictly in accordance with law and be completed within three months. Learned Asstt. Attorney General as well as learned counsel for respondents No.2 and 3 have no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. Copy of this order along with impugned order dated 04.10.2021 shall be sent to President, Zarai Taraqiati Bank Limited for compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with all listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
